body_transformation: The rounded head retains its pointed ears but now features soft petal-like ear flaps with a subtle shimmer, while the large bloom atop the head transforms into a delicate, translucent fairy flower with five petals of soft pastel pink and ivory white. The green leaves on the body become smooth, velvety petals in lavender and petal gold, gently curving around the torso. The curled spiral tail tip maintains its dark teal color but now has a delicate, crystalline sheen along its edges. The skin texture shifts to a soft, matte finish with a faint starlight silver glow, replacing the original rough leafy surface.
signature_feature: Top bloom: translucent fairy flower with soft pastel pink petals and glowing starlight silver crystalline veins.
